name: Ham Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1 Blend the cream cheese, onion, horseradish, and Worcestershire sauce until smooth.
2 Separate the meat slices. Lay out five slices slightly overlapping on a 18-inch piece of aluminum foil.
3 Lay out two more rows to form a rectangle of meat.
4 Spread with the cheese mixture.
5 Roll up as a jelly roll using the foil, bringing the meat up at one end of the roll.
6 Use fingers to roll until complete.
7 Chill.
8 Just before serving, slice into 1-inch slices.
9 This recipe can also be used with Corned Beef or Smoked Beef.
